nasb.text: From these the coastlands of the nations were separated into their lands, every one according to his language, according to their families, into their nations.

esv.text: From these the coastland peoples spread in their lands, each with his own language, by their clans, in their nations.

cnv.text: 這些人的後裔分散居住在沿海的土地和島嶼上。各人隨著自己的方言、宗族，住在自己的國土中。

ccb.text: 雅弗的这些后裔按宗族、语言和民族分散在各海岛。

csbs.text: 沿海列国的人是从这些人扩散到自己地方的，各按自己的语言、自己的家族、自己的国家。
